summary: Iteration 19: Complete testing of OrgaLandingPage and event images. All features working correctly. (1) Route /organizers displays OrgaLandingPage with all sections (Hero, Stats, Features, Advantages, Sports, Ecosystem, Support, Final CTA). (2) 'En savoir plus' button on HomePage correctly links to /organizers. (3) All 5 required data-testids found: orga-cta-register, orga-features, orga-sports, orga-cta-advantages, orga-cta-final. (4) CTA buttons redirect to /register. (5) All 12 events in database have unsplash image URLs matching their sports.
passed_tests: HomePage 'En savoir plus' button links to /organizers (verified in CTA section)
Navigation from HomePage to /organizers works correctly
data-testid='orga-sports' found (Sports section with 12 sport cards)
CTA button 'Créer mon événement gratuitement' redirects to /register
All 12 events have unsplash image_url (pytest passed)
GET /api/events/featured returns events with unsplash images (pytest passed)
GET /api/events/{id} returns event with image_url (pytest passed)
/events page displays all 12 events with sport-appropriate images
Event images match sports: billard, badminton, crossfit, kitesurf, bmx, combat, running, archery, triathlon, petanque, cycling, golf
seed_data_creation: 12 events with unsplash images: billard, badminton, crossfit, kitesurf, bmx, combat, running, archery, triathlon, petanque, cycling, golf
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19: OrgaLandingPage fully implemented at /organizers route. Key data-testids: orga-cta-register (Hero CTA), orga-features (Technology section), orga-sports (Multisport section), orga-cta-advantages (Advantages CTA), orga-cta-final (Bottom CTA). HomePage 'En savoir plus' in CTA section links to /organizers. All 12 events have sport-specific unsplash images. Preview access: ?preview=SPORTLYO2026.
